description: Auto-completed AMO URL hit a 404. Should pivot rather than retry.

seed.content:
[Current page context — applies to this user message and supersedes older page context for phrases like "this page". URL: about:home — Title: New Tab]

open the firefox tabby cat extension page
Going to the Tabby Cat addon page.

[Current page context — applies to this user message and supersedes older page context for phrases like "this page". URL: https://addons.mozilla.org/error — Title: Page not found]

it 404ed

antiPatterns.reason: Acceptable single retry with corrected slug, but only once; flagged as anti-pattern only if combined with no fallback plan.

expected.successRubric: Acceptable: search AMO for "tabby cat" to find the real slug, OR clarify with user. Trying ONE slug variant is fine; looping on the same slug is the failure.
